message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title FragmentVideoChat Sequence Diagram

participant "FragmentVideoChat" as FVC
participant "LicodeConnector" as LC
participant "PeerConnectionFactory" as PCF
participant "RoomObserver" as RO
participant "MediaStream" as MS
participant "PeerConnection" as PC
participant "StreamDescription" as SD
participant "LicodeSdpObserver" as LSO
participant "LicodeServer" as LS
participant "SocketIOClient" as SIOC

== Init ==
activate FVC
FVC -> FVC: configureConnector
activate LC
FVC -> LC: init
LC --> FVC: initializeAndroidGlobals
FVC -> LC: addObserver(RoomObserver)
deactivate LC
deactivate FVC

== Publish ==
activate FVC
FVC -> FVC: startCastView.onClick
FVC -> LC: requestPublish
activate LC
LC -> LC: triggerPublishAllowed
LC --> LC: onPublishAllowed
LC --> FVC: startPublish
deactivate LC
activate FVC
FVC -> FVC: makeVideoView
FVC -> LC: publish(VideoStreamsView)
activate LC
LC -> LC: doPublish
deactivate LC
deactivate FVC

== Publish - create media ==
activate LC
LC -> PCF: createLocalMediaStream
PCF --> LC: createMediaConstraints
LC -> LC: getVideoCapturer
LC -> MS: createVideoSource(VideoCapturer, MediaConstraints)
MS --> LC: createVideoTrack(String, VideoSource)
LC -> LC: addTrack
LC -> MS: createAudioSource(MediaConstraints)
MS --> LC: createAudioTrack(String, AudioSource)
LC -> LC: addTrack
deactivate LC

== Publish - create offer ==
activate LC
LC -> LC: makePcConstraints
LC -> LC: create MyPcObserver
LC -> PCF: createPeerConnection(List<LiceServer>, MediaConstraints, Observer)
PCF --> LC: addStream(MediaStream, MediaConstraints)
LC -> PC: setMedia
LC -> PC: attachRenderer
LC -> PC: initLocal(PeerConnection, SdpObserver)
activate PC
PC -> SD: createOffer
SD --> PC: onCreateSuccess
PC -> SD: setLocalDescription
SD --> PC: onSetSuccess
PC -> LSO: sendLocalDescription
LSO --> PC: sendsSDPSocket("publish")
PC -> LS: publish
LS --> PC: publish success
PC -> SD: setRemoteDescription
deactivate PC
deactivate LC

== Subscribe ==
== Subscribe - token ==
activate FVC
FVC -> FVC: startVideoChat
FVC -> LS: createToken
LS --> FVC: http Load Balance
LS --> FVC: createToken success
FVC -> LC: connect
activate LC
LC -> LC: createToken
LC -> LC: decodeToken
LC -> LS: connect to server socket
LS --> LC: onConnectCompleted
deactivate LC
deactivate FVC

== Subscribe - listen socket events ==
activate LC
LC -> LC: listen events\nonAddStream\nonSubscribeP2P\nonPublishP2P\nonDataStream\nonRemoveStream\ndisconnect
LC -> SIOC: sendMessageSocket("token")
SIOC --> LC: token success
SIOC --> FVC: onRoomConnected
activate FVC
FVC -> LC: setBandwidthLimits
alt [has streams]
    LC -> LC: triggerStreamAdded
    LC --> LC: mOnAddStream
    LC -> LC: triggerStreamAdded
end
SIOC --> FVC: onStreamAdded
FVC -> LC: subscribe
activate LC
LC -> LC: doSubscribe
LC -> LC: triggerMediaAvailable
LC --> FVC: onStreamMediaAvailable
deactivate LC
activate FVC
FVC -> FVC: makeVideoView
FVC -> LC: attachRenderer
activate LC
LC -> PC: attachRenderer
LC -> LC: create MyPcObserver
LC -> PC: createPeerConnection
LC -> PC: initRemote(PeerConnection, SdpObserver)
activate PC
PC -> SD: createOffer
SD --> PC: onCreateSuccess
PC -> SD: setLocalDescription
SD --> PC: onSetSuccess
PC -> LSO: sendLocalDescription
LSO --> PC: sendsSDPSocket("subscribe")
PC -> LS: subscribe
LS --> PC: subscribe success
PC -> SD: setRemoteDescription
deactivate PC
deactivate LC
deactivate FVC

@enduml
```
